title: Financial efficiency ratios
summary: 9609 A Level — asset turnover, inventory days, receivables and payables days.

simpleExplanation.title: Using assets well
simpleExplanation.summary: Efficiency ratios show how quickly inventory sells and cash is collected or paid — signalling working capital management.
steps: Lower days often mean faster cash cycle.

sections.content: **Efficiency ratios** (10.2.3) connect **operations** to **accounts**. Show **day calculations** clearly.
